data.body:
G3 container coverage review (parent 3fe1 + this exemplar child): clean — no findings.

This child fully and uniquely covers parent AC2 (exemplar package llm/plan_review/ fully remediated as the reference others copy; BLE001 + scoped T201 enabled with a shrinking per-file-ignores allowlist; plan_review excluded). It also materially contributes to SC1 (establishes the one lint-enforced way via the reference PR + lint enable) and SC3 (turns on the CI gate so new unguarded blind-excepts / stray prints fail). It sets the narrowing-with-test pattern relevant to AC4.

4-bucket map vs parent criteria for this pairing:
- AC1 (substrate + stdout-purity test): structural — covered by sibling 8fbd.
- AC2 (exemplar + enable BLE001/T201 + shrinking allowlist): FULLY by this child.
- AC3 (~100 sites in batches): partial (plan_review subset); remainder covered by sweeps 8d01/d360/ceaa/fd72/0569.
- AC4 (narrowing bug + regression test): partial (sets pattern with test); also ceaa + sweeps.
- AC5 (allowlist emptied + final gate): partial (enables/seeds allowlist; emptying covered by 0ec1).
- SC1: fully (this child + 0ec1). SC2: partial (8fbd + sweeps). SC3: fully (gate enabled; finalized by 0ec1).

No parent acceptance/success criterion is left uncovered when checked against the whole sibling roster; no coverage gap is attributable to this pairing.
